AOV MONEY CLOSE

EXAMPLE 1:



I Bet You’d Give Just About Anything to Feel Better, Wouldn’t You?



Especially considering all of the long-term health problems that come from an unhealthy gut…



The autoimmune challenges…the inflammation…the struggles with your weight, your blood sugar, and even your heart health…



If you’re like most of my patients…



Then honestly you’re SCARED about what the future could hold if you don’t make changes to your wellbeing.



Not only could continuing down your current path put your future at risk…



But being sick all of the time can also mean paying $5,000 or more per year for side-effect filled medications…



Paying thousands of dollars extra each year for health insurance premiums…



And spending more and more time at the doctor’s office each year…



Which means less time with your family, or outdoors, or doing any of the things you love.



That’s Why I Truly Believe Every American Can

Benefit From COMPANY Structured Silver…



And right now I’m sure you’re probably wondering how you can get COMPANY Structured Silver as fast as possible…



Along with how often you’ll want to take.





The truth is that there are only limited supplies of COMPANY Structured Silver available…



And that’s not a marketing gimmick or anything like that, it’s a fact.



Remember, COMPANY Structured Silver is made using a very complex process…



It’s produced in clean-room conditions that follow GMP standards…



It’s made with pure water that’s constructed using steam and oxygen…



It’s manufactured using a special electromagnetic process that maintains

the purity of the silver and keeps it free from contaminates.



It’s molecularly structured to kill pathogens on contact…



And it’s formulated for alkalinity, making it superior to most other silver COMPANYs on the market.



This process is CRUCIAL for producing the best silver on the market today… But it’s also extremely time consuming and expensive for COMPANY…

Which Means Out-of-Stocks Are Always a Risk…



Because COMPANY can only produce a limited number of bottles at any given time.



Plus on top of that…



Because COMPANY Structured Silver can help with so much more than just

your gut health…



People all over the country are using it to clear up acne and nail fungus…



As a safe and natural disinfectant…





To reduce the pain and inflammation caused by arthritis… To kill common viruses that cause the cold and the flu… And so much more.



















































Caption: A partial list of health challenges Structured Silver can help with.



There are literally hundreds of applications for COMPANY Structured Silver…



And As A Result, Our Customers End Up Ordering Several Bottles At A Time…





So they can remain stocked up on this wonderful and health-protecting

liquid…



And so that they can give it to their family and friends too.



Now we’re thrilled that so many families trust COMPANY Structured Silver

for their health…



But its incredible popularity has put even more of a strain on our production

capacities…



Which again, can make out-of-stocks a very real concern. With that being said however…

I also don’t want anyone to struggle with an imbalanced gut…



Or to feel low-energy, tired, sick, and fatigued, when it doesn’t need to be that way…



Which is why in the next few moments…



I’m Going To Share How You Can Get Your Hands On a Brand-New Bottle of COMPANY Structured Silver today…



As part of our “Protect Your Gut Initiative.”



First though, let me quickly return to the second question… Concerning how much COMPANY Structured Silver you should take? This one is actually pretty straight forward…

Just take two small teaspoons twice a day… For at least 30 days.

Here’s Why It’s Important to take COMPANY

Structured Silver for at least 30 days.





From the moment you put the first teaspoon of COMPANY Structured Silver

in your mouth…



You’ll start killing bad germs and bacteria.



As the silver makes its way through your throat, your digestive system, your bloodstream, and ultimately your bladder…



It’s continuously killing the pathogens it comes into contact with. After about 6 hours, the silver will be flushed out of your system… Which means it’s time for more.

But while COMPANY Structured Silver kills germs and bacteria inside of you

from Day 1…



The more you use it, the more effective it will be…



Plus, because your body is being assaulted by toxins and pathogens on a

daily basis…



It’s best if you look at COMPANY Structured Silver as a “daily defense”… Something you make part of your normal, every-day routine…

Much in the same way you would a multivitamin or a probiotic.



It’s for that reason that I personally recommend you choose at least 3 bottles

of COMPANY Structured Silver…



And 6 bottles if you want to have the greatest health benefits.



A single bottle of COMPANY Structured Silver will go to work in your gut right away, attacking pathogens and germs…



While continuing to use COMPANY Structured Silver for a full three months provides you with ongoing protection…





And when you commit to using COMPANY Structured Silver for a full six months, that’s when the greatest magic happens…because you’re truly giving your gut the “reset” it deserves…and creating an environment where good, healthy bacteria can thrive.



And the good news is..
